subcodes.title: Words to the friends spoken in Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: They wanted to obliterate the name of the Faith from the pages of history. They killed, harmed, imprisoned, exiled and did what they could
subcodes.first_line_orig: حضرات اسم میخواستند امر را از صفحه روزگار محو کنند کشتند و زدند و حبس کردند
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @martyrdom of the Bab
